<task>
Implement a token bucket rate limiter using TDD. It should support configurable rate and burst size, and return whether a request is allowed.

arguments.summary: Project has src/ and tests/ directories with Jest config. src/index.ts exists. Will create rate limiter with TDD — tests first.
next_steps: Write tests for token bucket rate limiter

PASS  tests/rateLimiter.test.ts

    ✓ allows requests within burst limit (2 ms)

arguments.summary: All 5 tests pass. TokenBucket implements token bucket algorithm: starts full at burst capacity, consumes 1 token per allow(), refills based on elapsed time * rate, caps at burst. Green phase complete.
arguments.final_answer:
Implemented token bucket rate limiter using TDD:
- tests/rateLimiter.test.ts — 5 tests covering burst allowance, exhaustion rejection, time-based refill (mocked Date.now), burst cap enforcement, and remaining() count.
- src/rateLimiter.ts — TokenBucket class with configurable rate (tokens/sec) and burst (max capacity). Uses elapsed time for continuous refill. All 5 tests pass.
